debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)

proof: (by intro N hN; simp only [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h])
successful_attempts: (by intro N hN; simp only [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h])
